name: obsidian-sync-mcp
description: MCP server for accessing your Obsidian vault via CouchDB LiveSync

scripts.build:lib: tsup lib/livesync-commonlib/src/index.ts --format esm --dts --outDir dist/lib --external pouchdb-core --external pouchdb-adapter-http --external pouchdb-mapreduce --external pouchdb-replication --external pouchdb-find --external transform-pouch --external pouchdb-merge --external pouchdb-utils --external pouchdb-errors --external octagonal-wheels --external diff-match-patch --external xxhash-wasm --external fflate --external minimatch
scripts.build: npm run build:lib && npm run build:server
